meaning: adj.备有空气调节装置的,装有空气调节器的
examples: The specific scheme to apply electric locomotive power supply on airconditioned trains in our country is put forward.
The 71 bedrooms (30 original and 41 new, decorated in some cases in a lighter, more modern style) are airconditioned, as are the dining rooms.
In pre-airconditioned Italy, August nights waxed unbearably hot.
